title: [release-1.29] Fix CVE-2024-11218
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Backport the changes from [GHSA-5vpc-35f4-r8w6](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5vpc-35f4-r8w6) to the 1.29 branch.

#### How to verify it

Expert manual scrutiny and CI passing

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes [RHEL-67614](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-67614) [RHEL-67608](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-67608)

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Ref.: [Commits from 1.33 branch](https://github.com/containers/buildah/compare/286ece65ba1b874d6ecc635b764f7d8c8d9825d6..bee8f9b1ea0f74b7561857db66496e0eb9a75938).

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Fix GHSA-5vpc-35f4-r8w6 a.k.a. CVE-2024-11218 for buildah-1.29
```

comments.body: **Note**:  This is VERY rough and ready and very likely not correct.  My focus was ONLY on the changes needed between 1.29 vanilla, and 1.33 (Fix TOCTOU commit) needed to get this to compile.  More work is needed, but maybe this is moving in a good direction?

@dashea I appreciate you're taking the time to go over the changes.  I had set this in "draft" mode, but perhaps should have made it more clear that this isn't ready for any kind of review yet.  I was still working my way through the 1.33 commits and files, one by one and comparing them to what's here.  I've already identified a bunch of changes and made them in my working tree.

So if I push, it will screw up all your comments :cry: Regardless, I'm going to push forward on my cleanup efforts.  It's going slowly but it is going.  Once I'm done I'll make an effort to revisit your comments and see if/any/which still apply.  Thanks again for helping out.

Force-push: Second-pass comparing and fixing changes here vs related 1.33 commits and vanilla 1.29.  Verified buildah compiles after each commit.  Didn't do anything with the tests or test-changes, there could/probably is still broken bits in them.

> Is this a dupe of #5964?

Probably.  We're in a bit of a race to get this done.  But I think this PR is ready for an initial look-over.  There's just one system test that's failing I need to stare at.  It's probably a dumb mistake I made.

Force-push: Fix to the previously failing `bud-with-mount-cache-image-from-like-buildkit` system test.  There was a subdirectory specified twice in the command-line.  Should be fixed now :crossed_fingers:
A couple of nits for consideration.  @dashea or @nalind PTAL
Force-push: Added new commit addressing Tom's nits.

> Mostly nits, but I'd like us to decide whether we're fixing [CVE-2024-9407](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhqq-8f65-5xfc) in here or not, with my preference being "yes".

My only objection would be if it somehow means getting this in and released will take longer or push us closer to the deadlines for CVE-2024-11218.  It seems like "no", and since I'm only partially groking all the changes here anyway, I'm already dependent on yours/Toms expertise.  ESP WRT the race condition which is all but untestable (or at best, very hard to test).

Edit: Also, on an administrative note - if we do include it, let's try and make sure it's mentioned in the updated changelog & release notes b/c I may not remember.

I'd like to get this merged today at the latest.  @cevich please do what's fastest: either remove the 9407 bits and do them separately, or add them to this one.  I could have sworn we took care of 9407 prior here....

> I'd like to get this merged today at the latest. @cevich please do what's fastest: either remove the 9407 bits and do them separately, or add them to this one. I could have sworn we took care of 9407 prior here....

We're in agreement, and I think I've sorted out all Nalin's concerns.  Will be pushing shortly for final review and -knock-on-wood- CI will behave itself on a Friday.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *nalind*, *TomSweeneyRedHat* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.29/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat,cevich,nalind] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Thanks for all your help @nalind and @TomSweeneyRedHat 

Also thanks to @vnaruka for getting the 1.29 backport work started.

LGTM
Really nice work @cevich , and TYVM @nalind for the assist.
